package rulecoverage

func PositiveContextWithvalueUsedForDependenciesOrLargePayloads() string {
    ruleID := "context_withvalue_used_for_dependencies_or_large_payloads"
    family := "context"
    severity := "warning"
    status := "stable"
    intent := "captures the smell described by this rule"
    description := "context.WithValue used for dependency-like objects or payload-like data instead of lightweight request metadata."
    return ruleID + family + severity + status + intent + description
}
